description_long: This is a polygonal, faceted barrel or bucket with a wide, tapered body and a flat, octagonal lid that is slightly ajar. The lid features a small, rectangular integrated grip at its center, making it easy to lift or remove. The body of the container is vertically segmented, giving it a geometric, industrial appearance. The interior is hollow and dark, indicating it is designed to hold or store items. There are no visible handles on the sides, and the exterior is free from any decorative markings or labels. The overall finish is matte and the color is a uniform dark gray, suggesting it is made from metal or heavy-duty plastic.
description: A faceted, dark gray barrel or bucket with an octagonal lid and integrated grip, featuring a matte, industrial finish and no visible side handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid and wide, hollow interior.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the lid's integrated grip and the faceted body.
description_view_2: Top-down view with the lid mostly closed, showing the octagonal shape and central grip.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the open lid and geometric body.
